blocks.body: Future Perfect: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Will + subject + have + V3? dla czynności, które mają być zakończone do przyszłego momentu.

{"level":"B1–B2","intro":"W pytaniach z Future Perfect stawiamy will przed podmiotem: Will + subject + have + V3?","rules":[{"label":"Yes/No question","color":"emerald","text":"Zacznij od Will + subject + have + V3?","example":"Will you have finished by 6 p.m.?"},{"label":"Wh-question","color":"blue","text":"Słowo pytające stoi przed will.","example":"What will she have prepared by the time we arrive?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkich odpowiedziach używamy tylko will albo won't.","example":"Yes, I will. / No, they won't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe schematy","intro":"Spójrz na główne typy pytań i krótkich odpowiedzi.","items":[{"label":"Yes/No","title":"Will + subject + have + V3?","subtitle":"Will they have finished before noon?"},{"label":"Wh-","title":"What / When / Why + will + subject + have + V3?","subtitle":"What will you have completed by Friday?"},{"label":"Short answer","title":"Yes, subject + will. / No, subject + won't.","subtitle":"Yes, she will. / No, they won't."},{"label":"Focus","title":"completed by then","subtitle":"Pytanie dotyczy tego, co już będzie gotowe do przyszłego punktu."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy takie pytania brzmią naturalnie","sections":[{"label":"Pytania o deadline","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, czy czynność będzie zakończona do określonej godziny, daty albo deadline'u.","examples":[{"en":"Will you have finished the report by Friday?","ua":"Czy raport będzie gotowy do piątku?"},{"en":"Will they have packed by tomorrow morning?","ua":"Czy przygotowanie będzie gotowe do rana?"}]},{"label":"Przed innym przyszłym wydarzeniem","color":"blue","description":"Takie pytania pomagają sprawdzić kolejność przyszłych wydarzeń.","examples":[{"en":"Will she have left before we arrive?","ua":"Czy jej wyjazd nastąpi przed naszym przyjazdem?"},{"en":"What will you have prepared by the time the class starts?","ua":"Co już będzie gotowe przed startem drugiego wydarzenia?"}]},{"label":"Pytania o rezultat i postęp","color":"amber","description":"Wh-questions dobrze działają, gdy chcesz zapytać, ile albo co dokładnie będzie już zakończone.","examples":[{"en":"How many lessons will you have completed by next month?","ua":"Pytamy o wielkość gotowego rezultatu."},{"en":"How much money will they have saved by summer?","ua":"Pytamy o sumę do przyszłej granicy."}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"violet","description":"W krótkich odpowiedziach nie powtarzaj całej konstrukcji, jeśli nie potrzebujesz dodatkowego nacisku.","examples":[{"en":"Will he have finished by 6? — Yes, he will.","ua":"Krótka odpowiedź z will."},{"en":"Will they have learned enough by then? — No, they won't.","ua":"Krótka odpowiedź z won't."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie question patterns","intro":"Oto najczęstsze modele.","rows":[{"en":"Will you have finished by tomorrow evening?","ua":"yes/no question","note":"pytanie o deadline"},{"en":"What will she have prepared by then?","ua":"wh-question","note":"pytanie o gotowy rezultat"},{"en":"Will they have left before the meeting starts?","ua":"future order","note":"sprawdzanie kolejności wydarzeń"},{"en":"Will he have saved enough by summer? — No, he won't.","ua":"short answer","note":"krótka odpowiedź bez powtarzania całej formy"}],"warning":"W krótkich odpowiedziach zwykle nie mówimy Yes, I will have, jeśli po tym zdanie się nie ciągnie dalej."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie has zamiast have w pytaniu.","wrong":"❌ Will she has finished by noon?","right":"✅ Will she have finished by noon?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Dodawanie did do Future Perfect.","wrong":"❌ Did they will have completed the task by Friday?","right":"✅ Will they have completed the task by Friday?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Nieprawidłowa krótka odpowiedź.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she will have.","right":"✅ Yes, she will."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytania w Future Perfect = Will + subject + have + V3?","Słowo pytające stawiamy przed will: What will you have done?","W krótkich odpowiedziach wystarczy will albo won't.","Takie pytania pomagają sprawdzić, co już będzie gotowe do przyszłego momentu albo wydarzenia."]}
